astralBeastWorld.description: The Astral Beast World uses the same logout procedure as the MUD (Multi-User Dungeon area). Players must find the Astral Gate to safely leave.

steps.action: Locate the Astral Gate NPC or object on the current map.
Interact with the Astral Gate — a confirmation dialog appears: 'Do you wish to leave the Astral Realm and return to the mortal world?'
Selecting Yes triggers the logout sequence: screen fades, player is transported back to their last safe location.
Selecting No dismisses the dialog and returns to gameplay.
If the player is in combat, the gate is unavailable and a message reads: 'You cannot leave the Astral Realm while in combat.'

unsafeLogout.penalty: If the player closes the app without using the Astral Gate, they respawn at the Astral Realm entry point with a 10% experience penalty.
unsafeLogout.message: You were pulled back to the mortal world unwillingly. The astral energies have drained some of your experience.

astralGateNpc.name: Astral Gate Keeper
astralGateNpc.description: A luminous being of pure energy standing beside the shimmering astral gate.
astralGateNpc.greeting: Traveller. The mortal world awaits beyond this gate. Shall I send you back?

options.label: Yes, return me to the mortal world
No, I remain in the Astral Realm
